name: Frontend Development
description: Handles UI/UX implementation, React/Next.js development, and client-side logic.

name: Backend Development
description: Responsible for APIs, databases, server-side logic, authentication, and performance.

name: Mobile Development
description: Develops cross-platform and native mobile applications using Flutter and other frameworks.

name: Quality Assurance
description: Performs manual & automated testing, bug tracking, regression, and quality validation.

name: UI/UX Design
description: Creates user interfaces, wireframes, prototypes, design systems, and user research.

name: DevOps
description: Manages CI/CD pipelines, cloud infrastructure, deployments, monitoring, and security.

name: Project Management
description: Coordinates sprints, timelines, task assignments, stakeholder communication, and delivery.

name: Sales & Marketing
description: Handles lead generation, client outreach, campaigns, branding, and partnerships.

name: Human Resources
description: Manages recruitment, onboarding, employee engagement, performance reviews, and culture.

name: Finance & Accounts
description: Oversees budgeting, payroll processing, invoicing, financial reporting, and compliance.
